scope: Read-only source, local runtime, and deterministic contract audit. No Worker, Pod, provider request, or credential decryption occurred.

config_document_contract.required_target_state: Definition document ID selects one config bundle; format and target path remain Definition-owned through materialization.

create_contract_gaps: WorkerSpec and protobuf carry positional configuration bundle IDs rather than Definition document IDs.
The compiler emits anonymous USE_CONFIG_BUNDLE declarations.
Worker create options expose protocol adapters but not backend-filtered compatible resource candidates.
The Resource-native Web path consumes returned adapters, while a legacy static Worker protocol map remains.
verified_commands: go test selected Backend, Runner, Web, Rust Core, and protobuf Worker contract checks

blocker.required_decision: Approve named Definition configuration-document bindings as the replacement for positional config_bundle_ids.
blocker.rejected_behavior: Do not add a dual-read or positional fallback path.
